chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 550 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 3445/16. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No. 2746/14. 16.12.2025 Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, advocate alongwith Ms. Tayyaba Kayani, Collector, Collectorte of Customs Appraisement, Port Muhammad Bin Qasim, Karachi. Under instructions, learned counsel does not press the reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
